31.reason: When EOF is reached and a word was being built, the function returns 0 without storing the word. This causes the last word to be lost if the file does not end with a non-letter character.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  When EOF is reached and no word was being read, the function should return EOF (or -1) to signal end-of-file, not 0, because 0 is a valid return value for a word of length 0 (which shouldn't happen). The reference program returns EOF.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  When EOF is reached and a word was being built, the function returns 0 without storing the word. This causes the last word to be lost if the file does not end with a non-letter character.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: fails to return the last word if the file ends with a letter; should check if i>0 and return 1 before returning 0
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Fails to return the last word if the file ends with a letter without a trailing delimiter. Should check if i>0 and return 1 after null-terminating.
